title: AAV transient transfection optimization DOE

metadata.objective: Optimize transient transfection operating space for AAV productivity and quality.
assumptions: AAV serotype, transfer construct, culture scale, media platform, harvest timing, and analytical methods are fixed for this first-pass DOE.
No observed endpoint data supplied yet; model fitting remains unavailable until results are imported.
metadata.biosafety_note: Design artifact only; not an experimentally verified production protocol.

factors.name: cell_density_at_transfection
factors.description: Viable cell density at the transfection event.

factors.name: dna_load_per_million_cells
factors.description: Total plasmid DNA mass normalized to viable cell count.

factors.name: transfection_reagent_to_dna_ratio
factors.description: Mass ratio of transfection reagent to total plasmid DNA.

factors.name: transfer_plasmid_fraction
factors.description: Transfer-vector plasmid fraction of total plasmid DNA while helper and rep/cap balance remains fixed by the platform recipe.

threshold.description: Maintain harvest viability at or above the platform floor.
Limit aggregate or high-molecular-weight impurity signal.

constraints.name: fixed_platform_recipe
constraints.description: Serotype/capsid, cell line, media platform, culture scale, harvest window, and helper/rep-cap balance are fixed for this first DOE.

constraints.name: plasmid_fraction_context
constraints.description: transfer_plasmid_fraction varies within a platform recipe; other plasmid fractions should be adjusted by the executing scientist to preserve total DNA mass.

decision_notes: Select the recommended design unless the user overrides candidate_design_id. The default objective favors first-pass curvature learning within a 20-run preferred budget.
